productDisplayName: Nike Women Dual Fusion Grey Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteThese Dual Fusion ST 2 shoes from nike with plush cushioning and supportive Fit are designed for runners. The single-layer mesh upper gives a breathable, comfortable fit while the pylon midsole gives cushioning, support and stability. Flex-foot grooves at the forefoot gives enhanced flexibility.Product DetailsMesh upper with synthetic overlaysCentral lace upsPadded tongue with brandingMesh lining in the padded insolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfortWaffle patterned lugs on the outsole with a decoupled heelMaterial and CareMeshWipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
